<function=python>

# Check yellow L pixel count

for node in seg['nodes']:

        print(f"Yellow: id={node['id']} pixels={node['pixels']} boundary={node['boundary']}")

# Check player position

        print(f"Player: boundary={node['boundary']}")
        break

# Check timer bar (black part at top right)

    if node['color'] == 'B' and node['pixels'] > 30 and node['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"Timer black: pixels={node['pixels']} boundary={node['boundary']}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
